title: A gun, drugs and emotional testimony: Live updates from Hunter Biden trial
shortDescription: Live updates from the Hunter Biden trial

title: Hunter Biden's candid audiobook is prosecutor's chief weapon at trial
shortDescription: The surreal, history-making courtroom drama was brought into sharp relief as First lady Jill Biden returned for Day 2 of the proceedings.

title: When Trump said an indicted president 'would cripple' US government
shortDescription: Trump said 2016 rival Hillary Clinton would cause an "unprecedented constitutional crisis" if indicted. He's running under conviction and indictment

title: Some GOP lawmakers aren't talking about Hunter Biden's gun case. Here's why.
shortDescription: House and Senate Republicans remain largely silent on Hunter Biden's trial after spending more than a year investigating the president and his son.

title: Will Trump join growing list of politicians elected after conviction?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump could possibly join the growing list of politicians who have been convicted of crimes but still held office after.

title: D-Day spawned Joe Biden's generation. Can it save America now?
shortDescription: In a trip to Normandy to commemorate the D-Day anniversary, Joe Biden will try to inspire a world in conflict with a look to the Greatest Generation.

title: Mixed signals. A right-wing revolt. Biden's Gaza cease-fire plan
shortDescription: The White House says it has 'every expectation' Israel will, if Hamas does, accept the US-backed cease-fire plan for Gaza. But Netanyahu risks a revolt over it.

title: Dr. Fauci's 50-year plus career in public health from Reagan to Biden
shortDescription: Dr. Anthony Fauci's work in public health spans across more than five decades and seven U.S. presidential administrations.

title: Democrats and Republican lawmakers react to Trump's felony conviction
shortDescription: Lawmakers are reacting to Donald Trump's conviction with thoughts ranging from respect for the jury's decision to certainty that it'll be overturned.

title: Trump falsely claims he never said 'Lock her up' about Clinton | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump was documented saying the phrase and calling for Clinton's imprisonment numerous times throughout his 2016 presidential campaign.

title: Biden speaks on Israel-Hamas War, alleged war crimes
shortDescription: President Joe Biden recently addressed a swath of foreign policy issues, including the conflict in Gaza.

title: Biden limits illegal entry into US
shortDescription: President Joe Biden signed an executive order that will cap entry and prevent migrants from seeking asylum if they cross into the U.S. illegally.

title: Post misleads with claim Kamala Harris 'leaving' White House | Fact check
shortDescription: The claim refers to her cross-country travel that began in April, not any type of job change. She continues to serve as Joe Biden’s vice president.

title: Hunter Biden trial calls first witness: FBI agent who was depicted in TV show
shortDescription: Hunter Biden is on trial for federal gun charges. Prosecutors called their first witness Erika Jensen. She is an FBI agent who was depicted in an HBO show.

title: Hunter Biden's laptop to be used as evidence in federal gun trial
shortDescription: Hunter Biden is on trial for federal gun charges. His infamous laptop which has stoked controversy could be introduced as evidence. What to know.

title: OnPolitics: GOP plots revenge in Congress after Trump conviction
shortDescription: Republican lawmakers are seeking revenge for the historic conviction of former President Donald Trump in a New York hush money case.

title: Which states are having primaries today? Here's what to watch
shortDescription: Five states and Washington D.C. have primary elections on June 4. Here's where they're happening and what you need to know.

title: Trump bus covered in MAGA signs crashes in NYC on the way to rally
shortDescription: No one was hurt after a Trump-themed bus that sold souvenirs of the former president crashed into a large pole in NYC.

title: Biden said he lacked authority to act on the border. He's doing it anyway.
shortDescription: Congress frozen, President Joe Biden is using executive authority on immigration before the 2024 election that he previously said he did not have.

title: Democratic governor candidate hits GOP rival over abortion comments
shortDescription: Democratic candidate Josh Stein's campaign launched a new ad against Republican Mark Robinson, as abortion remains a key issue in their race.

title: What are the charges Hunter Biden faces?
shortDescription: Hunter Biden has been charged with three felonies over whether he lied on a federal form and, if convicted, faces up to 25 years in prison.

title: Wisconsin charges former Trump associates in fake elector scheme
shortDescription: Wisconsin Attorney General Josh Kaul filed forgery charges against attorneys Kenneth Chesebro and Jim Troupis and former Trump aide Mike Roman.

title: GOP plots revenge as Trump conviction hits Congress | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Dr. Anthony Fauci's testimony on Capitol Hill over the COVID-19 pandemic response. Court blocks grants to some businesses owned by Black women.

title: Netanyahu under pressure as Biden questions motives, Hamas refuses to bend
shortDescription: A Hamas political official said the militant group won't agree to a deal that does not secure "complete withdrawal" of Israeli troops from Gaza.

title: AZ border mayors reject Biden invite to DC asylum event
shortDescription: The Biden administration's executive order is expected to immediately shut down asylum processing in between official crossings at the U.S.-Mexico border.
